title: Flip Card

statement.markdown:
## Flip Card Animation Challenge
Create a simple flip card animation that can be toggled on and off.

### Requirements
1. The card should flip when the user clicks on the flip button.
2. The flip animation should be smooth and visually appealing.
3. The card should not flip when the user clicks outside the flip button.

constraints: The animation should use JavaScript and CSS.
The card should have a title and a paragraph of text.

starterCode.html:
index.html: Flip Card

Card Title

This is a paragraph of text.

styles.css: /* Add styles here */

gradingCriteria.description: The card flips when the user clicks on the flip button.
The flip animation is smooth and visually appealing.
The card does not flip when the user clicks outside the flip button.
